message:
agent: Fix message streaming with raw iterator and server-authoritative tails

Replace React Query's experimental_liveOptions (which silently drops
events during React batching) with a raw async iterator loop over a
mutable ref. Add server-side messageTail on checkpoint events
(turn_end, agent_end, auto_compaction_end) carrying only new messages
since the snapshot, so the client can self-correct on every turn
boundary.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/ys1y52n4asmb2612c03e7yeq
